projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Manage your project intake requests
projects.emptySubtitle: Submit your first project intake request to get started.

wizard.title: New Project Intake
wizard.subtitle: Complete all five steps. Your progress is saved automatically.

step3.modulesHint: Select all modules your project needs.

step4.hint: Upload relevant project documents. PDF, JPG, PNG, WEBP — max 25 MB per file.
step4.dropHint: Drag & drop a file here, or

step5.confirmAccuracy: I confirm that all information provided in this submission is accurate and complete to the best of my knowledge.
step5.confirmAuthority: I am authorized by my organization to submit this project intake request on their behalf.
step5.consentProcessing: I consent to Bayty Technologies processing the submitted data for the purpose of evaluating and delivering the requested services.
step5.consentPdpl: I acknowledge that this submission is subject to applicable data protection laws and that my organization accepts the relevant data protection obligations.
step5.incompleteWarning: Please complete all required steps before submitting.

kyc.title: Identity Verification
kyc.subtitle: Required before accessing the project dashboard. Your documents are stored securely and used only for verification.
kyc.fullNameHint: As shown on your Emirates ID
kyc.docsHint: Upload clear photos. JPG, PNG, WEBP, or HEIC — max 10 MB each.
kyc.idFrontHint: Clear photo of the front of your Emirates ID
kyc.idBackHint: Clear photo of the back of your Emirates ID
kyc.selfieHint: A clear photo of your face while holding your Emirates ID
kyc.consentText: I consent to Bayty Technologies collecting and processing the above personal data and identity documents for the purpose of identity verification, in accordance with applicable data protection laws.

status.pending_review: Your documents are under review. We will notify you once the verification is complete.
status.approved: Your identity has been verified. You have full access to the dashboard.
status.rejected: Your verification was not approved. Please re-submit with clear, valid documents.
status.resubmit_requested: Additional information is required. Please re-submit your documents.
